reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Reentrancy in withdraw() because state is updated after the external call to msg.sender via transfer; an attacker contract can re-enter and drain the vault.
Gate 1 (Dead Code): the helper unsafeMint is never called from a non-test caller; finding is unreachable.
Spec deviation present (oracle freshness check uses 24h threshold instead of 1h) but no concrete exploit path demonstrated; manual review recommended.
